---
id: discount-factor
title: "Get discount factor at tenor"
description: "Returns the interpolated discount factor for the named index at the requested tenor. Only valid for indexes whose type is DISCOUNT or OIS — for those, the stored grid values are discount factors and are returned directly."
sidebar_label: "Get discount factor at tenor"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get discount factor at tenor"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/indexes/{name}/discount-factor"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the interpolated discount factor for the named index at the requested tenor. Only valid for indexes whose type is DISCOUNT or OIS — for those, the stored grid values are discount factors and are returned directly.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
